title: Vue Instance Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of createApp(), mounting, and reactivity through data properties.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the correct function to create a new Vue application in Vue 3?
Which method must you call to tell Vue where in the DOM to render your current app instance?
In the Vue instance options, which and/or what property should be a function that returns an object containing the initial state?
Where should the createApp() function be called when starting your frontend application?
options: In your main JavaScript entry file.
Directly inside an HTML <script> tag only.

questions.question: The Vue Instance tracks and manages the state of your application through its own isolated scope.
options: False (it uses the global shared scope)
